reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atencion. Siempre 2 cuadras de cola. Recien fui a cargar nafta y habia una gran casa rodante tapando surtidores vacios y no fueron capaz de avisar para pasar a dichos surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. There was always a two-block line. I just went to get gas and there was a large RV blocking empty pumps, and they didn't even bother to let me know when to use them.
